rubric: pilot-n2: at n=2 the cross-task variance is unestimable, so demonstrated and refuted are definitionally out of reach. The only reachable pilot outcomes are underpowered (survivors below min_survivors, or delta below the MDE) and tradeoff-signal-to-investigate. The powered follow-on run carries the full four-outcome rubric; it is NOT selectable at n=2.
note: Frozen, timestamped pre-registration for the n=2 paid pilot. Authored BEFORE the first scored run (the scored run refuses without a frozen artifact). The pass/fail line is judged against this file and is never moved after seeing results.
